scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within bioinformatics data processing scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: No methodological fallacies detected; outputs apply standard approaches appropriate to bioinformatics data processing tasks.

code_usability.detail: Script fails gracefully with clear install instructions when plotly/pandas are absent; path traversal check documented in Workflow Step 3 and Error Handling but not confirmed in script code.

functional_suitability.note: Kraken2, Bracken, Centrifuge, and custom TSV formats documented; interactive HTML output; single-sample limitation documented.

reliability.note: Fallback behavior documented; path traversal check in Workflow and Error Handling; verbatim redirect with absolute-first-action mandate.

performance_context.note: SKILL.md is 143 lines — lean; example/ directory present for testing.

agent_usability.note: Absolute-first-action mandate reinforced; verbatim redirect with Kraken2/Bracken first-step suggestion; path traversal check in Step 3.

human_usability.note: Description is natural and discoverable; forgiveness good via auto-detection of input format.

security.note: Path traversal check documented in Workflow Step 3 and Error Handling; no hardcoded secrets; script-level enforcement not confirmed.

maintainability.note: Script 441 lines with clear class structure; SKILL.md well-separated; example/ directory aids testability.

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; progressive disclosure present with example/; escape hatches documented; verbatim redirect enforced; single-sample limitation documented.

key_strengths: Supports multiple metagenomic classifier formats (Kraken2, Bracken, Centrifuge, custom TSV) with auto-detection
Absolute-first-action mandate reinforced — refusal fires before any taxonomy lookup or context processing
Path traversal check documented in both Workflow Step 3 and Error Handling sections
Interactive standalone HTML output is immediately usable without additional software

recommendations.title: Path traversal check documented but not confirmed in script
recommendations.problem: The path traversal check is documented in Workflow Step 3 and Error Handling, but no path validation logic was found in the script implementation.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation fix was applied to SKILL.md but script-level validation was not implemented.
recommendations.fix: Add path validation in main.py before opening the input file: check if the resolved path contains ../ or points outside the workspace, and exit with a clear error message if so.

recommendations.title: No multi-sample comparison guidance
recommendations.problem: The skill generates charts for single samples only. Multi-sample comparison is a common metagenomic workflow need and no workaround is suggested.
recommendations.root_cause: Single-sample limitation is documented but no alternative workflow is provided.
recommendations.fix: Add to Limitations: 'For multi-sample comparison, consider running the skill once per sample and combining outputs in a grid layout, or use a dedicated tool such as Kraken-Biom or Bracken-Biom.'
